selection.decision_rule: each contract independently tournaments every eligible complete clock-id, entry-ABI, ordering-barrier, and direct-TSC path; a challenger wins only by > max(1 ns/read, 5%) in >=8/9 paired batches
selection.post_init_boundary: PR_SET_TSC(PR_TSC_SIGSEGV) must not revoke TSC access after direct-provider selection

selection.decision_rule: median advantage > max(1 ns/read, 5%) and >=8/9 decisive paired wins

wall_selection.decision_rule: each contract independently tournaments every eligible complete clock-id, entry-ABI, ordering-barrier, and direct-TSC path; a challenger wins only by > max(1 ns/read, 5%) in >=8/9 paired batches
wall_selection.post_init_boundary: PR_SET_TSC(PR_TSC_SIGSEGV) must not revoke TSC access after direct-provider selection

perf.decision_rule: POSIX, eligible perf-mmap, and persistent perf-read complete public-dispatch paths compete in order; a challenger replaces the incumbent only by > max(1 ns/read, 5%) in >=8/9 paired batches, and the same tournament excluding the winner selects the measured fallback
perf.measurement_clock: raw SYS_clock_gettime(CLOCK_MONOTONIC_RAW), never libc/vDSO or the candidate under test

selection.read_cost_basis: perf mmap is Inline because tach issues no OS or host call on the hot path; persistent perf read and every CLOCK_THREAD_CPUTIME_ID entry route are SystemCall
